creator: r.neese@gmail.com
text:
The files.freeswitch.in is incorrect for startup. frreeswitch fails to load.

Fix: changed needed lines to point to the correct place of the pid storage

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: install net/freeswitch-core and add freeswitch_enable="YES" to /etc/rc.conf
attempt to use the rc.d/freeswitch script to start . if it starts it puts the pid file in the wron place
